mapper.select: select PROCESS_CD "value", PROCESS_NM "label" from M_WORK_PROCESS where NEW_PROCESS = '1' and PARENT_ID = '-1'
select DICT_LABEL "label" ,DICT_VALUE "value" from M_DICT_DATA where DICT_TYPE = 'MACHINE_LOCATION'

select PROCESS_CD "value", PROCESS_NM "label" from M_WORK_PROCESS where NEW_PROCESS = '1' and PARENT_ID != '-1' and PARENT_ID in (select ID from M_WORK_PROCESS where PROCESS_CD = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
select id "value",DEPT_NAME "label" from SYS_DEPT where IN_OUT_TYPE = 'O' and DEPT_LEVEL = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO M_WAIFU_PRICE_PROCESS ( ID, WAIFU_PACKAGE_CODE, WAIFU_PACKAGE_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, POSITION_CODE, POSITION_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, ALLOT_TYPE, MACHINE_TYPE_CODE, MACHINE_TYPE_NAME, RATE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )
SELECT #{item.id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.waifuPackageCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.waifuPackageName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.processDetailCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.processDetailName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.positionCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.positionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.allotType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.machineTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.machineTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nowDate} FROM DUAL
mapper.select: select DICT_VALUE "value",DICT_LABEL "label" from M_DICT_DATA where DICT_TYPE = 'WBHTFL'
